title: Excited Engineers, Artisans Posing With Adesina & Dangote
description: Excited young engineers & Artisans working on Dangote Oil Refinery project with President of African Development Bank (AFDB), Dr. Akinwunmi Adesina with the President/ CE of Dangote Industries Lim
html: Excited young engineers & Artisans working on Dangote Oil Refinery project with President of African Development Bank (AFDB), Dr. Akinwunmi Adesina with the President/ CE of Dangote Industries Limited, Aliko Dangote
